occurrence_sentence: Bioinnovation Institute and Deep Tech Lab Quantum join forces to fund quantum companies with life science applications.
BioInnovation Institute and Deep Tech Lab – Quantum Join Forces to Fund Quantum Companies With Life Science Applications

interaction_phrase: entered its Venture Lab acceleration program
occurrence_sentence: BioInnovation Institute (BII) announced that twelve new companies have entered its Venture Lab acceleration program for early-stage companies.

interaction_phrase: collaboration with BII's in-house quantum start-up accelerator
occurrence_sentence: As part of a collaboration with BII's in-house quantum start-up accelerator, Deep Tech Lab – Quantum, two quantum companies, [Alea Quantum Technologies](https://www.alea-quantum.com/), and DiaSense , will for the first time in BII's history join the Venture Lab program.

As part of a collaboration with BII's in-house quantum start-up accelerator, Deep Tech Lab – Quantum, two quantum companies, [Alea Quantum Technologies](https://www.alea-quantum.com/), and DiaSense , will for the first time in BII's history join the Venture Lab program.

As part of a collaboration with BII's in-house quantum start-up accelerator, Deep Tech Lab – Quantum, two quantum companies, [Alea Quantum Technologies](https://www.alea-quantum.com/), and DiaSense , will for the first time in BII's history join the Venture Lab program.

Deep Tech Lab — Quantum is an independent entity established by BioInnovation Institute in 2023 to leverage Denmark's world-leading research in quantum physics with BII's recognized excellence in creating, fostering, and maturing start-up and spin-out companies within life sciences.
